primary_contract: nwau_py.emergency_classification_parity_fixtures metadata-only emergency parity fixture contract for synthetic and local-only licensed fixtures covering UDG, AECC, transition handling, and downstream emergency NWAU validation under registry-backed era selection
completion_evidence: spec.md contract, caveats, and evidence surfaces
plan.md phased governance, fixture, validation, and documentation surfaces
licensing_caveats: Do not embed or redistribute licensed UDG, AECC, mapping, or grouper tables unless the source license explicitly permits it.
Keep local official fixtures, user-supplied reference fixtures, and any licensed grouper-derived artifacts outside the repository unless they are synthetic or otherwise redistributable.
Do not invent or imply a UDG-to-AECC crosswalk, equivalence class, or fallback mapping when the source evidence does not provide one.
description: Govern safe emergency classification parity fixtures for UDG, AECC, transition-year, and grouper-dependent workflows without redistributing licensed source material.
